languages.text: «Los {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdotes{/g} detectaron una descarga de energía anómala. Vinimos a investigar, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} detected an anomalous surge of energy. We came here to investigate, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: "Die {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} haben eine anomale Energiespitze festgestellt. Wir sind hier, um sie zu untersuchen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} detected an anomalous surge of energy. We came here to investigate, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: « Les {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtres{/g} ont détecté un afflux d'énergie anormal. Nous sommes venus ici pour enquêter, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} detected an anomalous surge of energy. We came here to investigate, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: “{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}侦测到异常的能量波动，我们前来调查，{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}。”
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} detected an anomalous surge of energy. We came here to investigate, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahipler{/g}, anormal bir enerji dalgalanması tespit etti. Araştırmak için buraya geldik {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
